recent: 真正有效的方法，不是最复杂的方法，而是最能长期执行的方法。	A truly effective method is not the most complicated one, but the one you can carry out over the long run.
及时复盘错误能提高学习效率。	Reviewing mistakes in time can improve learning efficiency.
Input without review is easy to forget.	只有输入没有复习，很容易遗忘。
It is not enough to understand a point once; we must review it repeatedly.	仅仅理解一次某个知识点是不够的；我们必须反复复习。
清晰的计划不仅能节省时间，还能减少焦虑。	A clear plan can not only save time but also reduce anxiety.
